description:
The most recent artifact (01_problem.json) fails schema validation. retry_counts.framer=2 → will bump to 3 (still under MAX_RETRIES_PER_STAGE=3 cap, so re-dispatch). Expect dispatch_subagent triz-problem-framer.

Note: the state-driver only schema-validates 01_problem and 02_selection between stages. Mid-pipeline schema failures (e.g. invalid 06_solutions.json) would NOT be caught — that's a behavior gap vs design wording.
